run_metadata.expansion_reason: Strict 72h window yielded 3 verified items (≤5 threshold); expanded to 5 days per skill rules

published_items.title: OpenAI launches $4B enterprise AI deployment company, acquires Tomoro

primary_source.access_status: HTTP 403 from sandbox; verified via partner press release and multi-outlet T2-T3 coverage

cross_references.role: corroborating — partner press release confirming deal
corroborating — Tomoro acquisition details, $14B valuation figure

key_claims.source: BBVA press release / multiple T2-T3 outlets

key_claims.claim: TPG lead; Advent, Bain Capital, Brookfield co-leads

caveats: Primary URL returned HTTP 403 from sandbox
Axios reports $14B valuation for the company; other outlets cite $4B capital; discrepancy unresolved — $4B capital figure used
Rival Anthropic announced a parallel enterprise services firm (Blackstone/Goldman/H&F, May 4) — outside this window

published_items.title: Claude Code v2.1.139 ships agent orchestration view, persistent /goal command, and MCP hot-reload

key_claims.claim: Agent view (Research Preview) accessible via `claude agents`
/goal command — Claude continues across turns until completion condition met
CLAUDE_CODE_PROJECT_DIR env var for stdio MCP servers
v2.1.139 released May 11 18:43 UTC; v2.1.138 May 9 06:33 UTC; v2.1.137 May 9 00:11 UTC

caveats: Agent view is labeled Research Preview — stability and feature completeness not yet at GA
/goal command in `-p` and Remote Control modes may have edge cases not yet documented

published_items.title: Hermes Agent overtakes OpenClaw to claim #1 on OpenRouter's global token rankings

primary_source.access_status: indexed via search engine; not fetched directly

cross_references.role: corroborating — MIT license and feature description

key_claims.source: NousResearch official X post (T2 for Nous Research stated; OpenRouter page for ranking)

key_claims.claim: 9 CVEs against OpenClaw March 2026, one 9.9 CVSS
key_claims.status: secondary — primary CVE advisories not fetched

key_claims.claim: 341 malicious entries found in ClawHub audit (Koi Security)
key_claims.status: secondary — primary audit report not fetched

caveats: Token volume is inference-demand proxy, not a measure of production deployments
CVE severity and audit details sourced from T3 only; primary advisories not fetched
No breakdown of Hermes token volume by use-case category available

published_items.title: Indosat builds sovereign LLM for Indonesian languages as center of AI North Star strategy
published_items.tier_nuance: T2 for CEO statements as reported; secondary because no new product launch from Indosat's own channels found in window — Sahabat AI is ongoing platform, not a new release

primary_source.access_status: indexed via search, full content summarized via WebFetch

cross_references.role: corroborating — Indosat corporate page confirming platform

key_claims.claim: Sahabat AI trained on Bahasa Indonesia, Sundanese, Javanese, Balinese, Batak, English

caveats: Platform is ongoing — not a new launch within this window
API access or integration details not confirmed during this run
GoTo partnership terms not disclosed in the Fortune article
